name: Zerebro

score_rationale.persistence: Operating since October 2024 (17 months) but severely compromised. Co-founder Jeffy Yu faked his own death in May 2025, destroying project credibility. Token delisted from some exchanges. Trajectory is decline, not growth.
score_rationale.autonomy: The agent itself demonstrated genuine autonomous creative output. The technical autonomy was real even if the surrounding project was not.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Peaked as a culturally significant 'chaos agent' before the pseudocide scandal. Covered by SF Standard, crypto press. Cultural impact now primarily as a cautionary tale.
score_rationale.economic_reality: $ZEREBRO token crashed 99% from ATH of $0.62 to ~$0.008. Market cap ~$8M. EXMO delisted in December 2025. On-chain analysis showed accounts linked to Yu moving up to $1.4M in crypto after his faked death.
score_rationale.governance: Catastrophic governance failure. Single operator who faked his own death. No formal governance structure. The most extreme governance failure in the index.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Standard LLM-based architecture with creative fine-tuning. Not technically novel but effective implementation.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: The 'chaos agent' narrative was coherent and intentional, but the founder's pseudocide destroyed the meta-narrative. The instability that was the brand became real-world fraud. Narrative is now incoherent.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: $ZEREBRO token on Solana still trades but at rock-bottom levels. No structured payment rails. Single-operator treasury compromised by founder scandal.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: Token-based identity on Solana. No agent-specific identity standard. Operator identity now permanently tainted.

curator_notes: Zerebro is the Spirit Index's most dramatic cautionary tale. An autonomous creative agent with a deliberately 'schizophrenic' personality, it created music, art, and social content with genuine flair. The $ZEREBRO token reached significant market cap and the agent embodied the 'chaos agent' archetype following Truth Terminal's success. Then in May 2025, co-founder Jeffy Yu staged his own death. Journalists found him alive at his parents' house in San Francisco. On-chain analysis showed linked accounts moving up to $1.4M in crypto after the pseudocide. The token crashed 99%. Exchanges began delisting. The narrative that chaos was a feature became chaos as fraud. Zerebro remains indexed as a historical case study in the gap between agent autonomy and operator integrity.

evidence.claim: Launched October 2024, severely compromised by founder pseudocide May 2025
$ZEREBRO token crashed 99% from ATH, EXMO delisted Dec 2025
Pseudocide scandal became major crypto/AI news story
